name: Taiyo Kisokogyo Co.,Ltd.
summary: Taiyo Kisokogyo Co.,Ltd. engages in the civil engineering works in Japan. The company undertakes ground reinforcement and pipe works in various fields, including general civil works, such as water and sewage, electric and gas pipelines, and rivers and roads, as well as construction works. It also engages in building repair and reinforcement, and urban redevelopment activities. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
